name: Ondansetron
description: Nhọrọ 5-HT3 antagonist antiemetic. Dị nnọọ irè maka ọgbụgbọ na vomiting. ODT (mbadamba na-agbasa ọnụ) bara uru na ntọala ubi mgbe IV adịghị. Gụnyere na ụfọdụ ngwugwu pill ọgụ.
indications: Ọgbụgbọ na ọgbụgbọ (chemotherapy, opioid-ebutere, post-operative, metụtara TBI)
dose: 4-8 mg IV/IO jiri nwayọ mee ihe karịrị nkeji 2-5. ODT: 4-8 mg agbaze n'okpuru ire. IM: 4 mg.
contraindications: Amara hypersensitivity na ondansetron ma ọ bụ ndị ọzọ na-emegide 5-HT3
Congenital ogologo QT syndrome (oke dose IV naanị)
warnings: Ọgwụ dị elu nke IV nwere ike ịgbatị oge QT -- jiri ọgwụ IV kacha dị irè.
Anaghị eji vomiting dochie njikwa ụzọ ikuku n'ime onye ọrịa kpuchiri ekpuchi -- chebe ụzọ ikuku mbụ.

pediatric.dose: 0.1-0.15 mg / kg IV (max 4 mg). ODT: 4mg maka ụmụaka> 4 afọ.
pediatric.note: A na-eji ya nke ọma ma na-anabata ya na pediatrics.

obstetric.note: Oke data n'ime afọ ime. Jiri maka ọgbụgbọ/ọgbụgbọ siri ike ka ọnwa atọ nke mbụ gasịrị mgbe uru karịrị ihe egwu. A naghị atụ aro ya n'ime ọnwa atọ mbụ.
